TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Kersti_Kaljulaid, title = Kersti_Kaljulaid, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kersti_Kaljulaid} }

S.FORM: Kersti Kaljulaid 12 bulad 30 demiad, Kersti Kaljulaid, u misingkiway. 1969 a mihca nalecuhan) u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) nu Estonia ayza sa ci Kersti Kaljulaid, micakat a demiad sa i 2016 a mihca 10 bulad 10 demiad. Her presidential term ended on 11 October 2021.
S.PHON: k…ôrsti kar~…ĺjur~…ĺaid ** bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad, k…ôrsti kar~…ĺjur~…ĺaid, u misiŇčkiwaj. **** a mińß ¶a nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan) u tabakiaj a tapaŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ ( ¶oŇčtuŇč) nu …ôstonia ajza sa ¶i k…ôrsti kar~…ĺjur~…ĺaid, mi ¶akat a d…ômiad sa i **** a mińß ¶a ** bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad. ńß…ôr pr…ôsid…ôntiar~…ĺ t…ôrm …ônd…ôd on ** o ¶tob…ôr ****.
S.FORM: Kersti Kaljulaid 12 bulad 30 demiad, Kersti Kaljulaid, u misingkiway. 1969 a mihca nalecuhan) u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) nu Estonia ayza sa ci Kersti Kaljulaid, micakat a demiad sa i 2016 a mihca 10 bulad 10 demiad. Her presidential term ended on 11 October 2021.
